title: Jagadhatri
desc: Unbeknownst to her family, a young woman leads a double life as an undercover intelligence officer, determined to clear her mother's name.

desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

desc: Reet, a career-oriented woman, finds it difficult to deal with the societal pressures of marriage alongside navigating her life as a journalist.

title: Saru
desc: A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status.
